column5: Description
Way too early but after the nominations today, I was having some fun looking at company's upcoming slates and speculating with a friend. Let's see how any of this ages.
Description

A24's Jesse Eisenberg musical

Idk how much faith I actually have in this... but it seems to be following the same release path as Pain & Glory, and if it bodes well at festivals and in the States then who knows. It's lower on the list for sure and the only Sony Pictures Classics push that I can see right now.

Why yes
As of now, probably A24's biggest push. I spoke to someone who worked on the film last March and was told it's vying for a Cannes bow and prime December release in the States.
Neon's earliest push and potentially a big one given all who's involved. Mungiu is always at Cannes and the fact they hopped on so early seems promising enough for January.

The only thing on Focus Features' slate that seems to have any promise. Maybe the new Paul Greengrass movie, but this is the only realistic option in my mind until we see how they perform.
